summary: FlinkJobUnhealthy: stream-taskmanager job 'Metric_threshold_monitoring_job' restarting (checkpoint expired) — PagerDuty incident #9632
note: Paged on the Flink taskmanager 'stream-taskmanager' because that is the loudest, most visible symptom (job restart loop). This is a downstream symptom; check whether the OLAP store/FoundationDB upstream is healthy before blaming the Flink pod.
